description: CompositionBlack knitted top made of 100% acrylic, has a front open buttoned placket, two pockets on the front and full sleevesFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryBring back the vintage with a warm bang! Crawl into this warm woollen overcoat from scullers over your regular attire and you would look great for any occasion. Use it either to camouflage your dress beneath and transform into a princess, or to simply show the sweater off.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
